empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide me with more details so we can look into this issue as soon as possible? We take pride in providing excellent service to our customers like yourself and it's unacceptable that you were double-chargged for an item. Please know that I will do everything in my power to resolve this matter promptly and satisfactorily for you.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I am <CUSTOMER_NAME> that I've been charged TWICE for my <PRODUCT>, order number <ORDER_ID>, on my last credit card statement. I've been a loyal customer for 2 years and I expect BETTER from your company. I demand a clear explanation for this <PRODUCT> <ISSUE>.99. If I don't get this resolved quickly, I'll be forced to speak to a manager and leave a public review, which I'd rather NOT DO.
